name: Early flag parsing order
summary: Use `firstPass` instead of `parsed` to check flags before extensions load
detail: `parsed` is only defined after the second pass (~line 693), but extension errors fire earlier. Use `firstPass` to access `--quiet` early in `main.ts`.
content: `parsed` is only defined after the second pass (~line 693), but extension errors fire earlier. Use `firstPass` to access `--quiet` early in `main.ts`.
